description: Structured route contracts for the current Sam and Caroline relationship routes.

routes.intent: Find relationship follow-up threads that may deserve action.

fallback_policy.policy: If relationship substrate or msgvault is missing, answer with the missing-source limitation instead of pretending the calendar is enough.
fallback_policy.repair_gate: Ask for or run source repair when required relationship sources are unavailable.

rules: Return ranked follow-up candidates, not just calendar items.

gap_behavior.when_required_source_missing: Say the route is undercovered and identify missing relationship/email sources.
gap_behavior.when_source_stale: Use stale sources only with explicit freshness caveat.

routes.intent: Find history-backed contacts at smaller consulting, advisory, agency, or specialist operating firms.

fallback_policy.policy: Use search_history_backed_people only as the declared backing surface with enrichment filters.
fallback_policy.repair_gate: Do not answer from keyword-only email search when enrichment-backed relationship search is unavailable.

rules: Return candidates with enrichment fields, relationship evidence, and context-fit caveats.

gap_behavior.when_required_source_missing: Say relationship search is unavailable and avoid fabricating candidates.
gap_behavior.when_source_stale: Name relationship index freshness before ranking candidates.

routes.intent: Use the example founder long-history relationship evidence for LFW relationship and business-development questions when contact context matters.
applies_to: smaller consulting firm contacts for LFW

boundaries: Query on demand; do not copy raw personal relationship records into LFW.
Use subject-note context as context-specific correction evidence, not hidden filters.

fallback_policy.policy: If the federated relationship index is unavailable, answer from LFW company sources and explicitly name the missing relationship route.
fallback_policy.repair_gate: Do not silently replace federated relationship evidence with personal media, health, or unrelated b-state sources.

rules: Do not materialize raw personal relationship records into LFW runtime state.

gap_behavior.when_required_source_missing: Declare the federated route unavailable or insufficient.
gap_behavior.when_source_stale: Name stale LFW company or federated source freshness before using it.
